title: pteridrys wusugongii
intro: Pteridrys wusugongii, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteridrys wusugongii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Pteridrys wusugongii is often used in decoctions or infusions, and its leaves are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
